properties.putsql-sql-statement:
update eucaim_cdm_ingestion.datasetingestioncontrol 
set processedRows = processedRows + 1
where DatasetIdentifier = '${datasetId}' and status = 'LOADING'

properties.Replacement Value:
UPDATE eucaim_cdm_ingestion.ImageStudy
SET ImagingProcedureIdentifier = '${ImagingIdentifier}',
    ImagingTimepoint = '${ImagingTimepoint}'
WHERE ImageStudyUID = '${StudyInstanceUID}';
